---
name: Submit a Skill
about: Submit an OpenClaw skill for inclusion in the master collection
title: "[SKILL] <skill-name>"
labels: skill-submission
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Info

**Name:** <!-- e.g. my-awesome-skill -->
**Description:** <!-- One sentence: what does it do? -->
**Category:** <!-- devops / productivity / coding / data / communication / media / finance / research / other -->

## Source

- [ ] This is my own skill
- [ ] This is a skill I found and recommend

**Link:** <!-- GitHub repo URL, ClaWHub slug, or attach files -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Has a valid `SKILL.md` with `name` and `description` frontmatter
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys or personal credentials
- [ ] Tested on a standard OpenClaw setup
- [ ] Clear and useful purpose

## Notes

<!-- Anything else the reviewer should know -->
